llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Only one AI arm available: ai_assisted using ChatGPT GPT-4o. This is compared against control (no AI assistance).
llm_extracted.notes: The outcome is explicitly log-transformed (measurement_unit = 'log(time)'). The regression coefficient -0.0013 represents the log difference in completion time between treated (AI-assisted) and control. Since the outcome is time (smaller is better) and already in log scale, the coefficient directly represents the log ratio effect. The negative coefficient indicates AI-assisted participants spent less time on tasks.
source_quotes: Time spent completing tasks, measured in log scale.
Treated volunteers used Rapid for the first time during the adoption period.

computed.notes: The outcome is explicitly log-transformed (measurement_unit = 'log(time)'). Since the outcome is time (smaller is better) and already in log scale, the coefficient directly represents the log ratio effect. The negative coefficient indicates AI-assisted participants spent less time on tasks.
